base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of attract_screen_character_intro_jp_normal — a ui (cutscene) from 1980 pac man. Japanese normal-names character-intro screen — shows 4 ghosts with character-archetype / nickname pairs: OIKAKE (Akabei), MACHIBUSE (Pinky), KIMAGURE (Aosuke), OTOBOKE (Guzuta). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Japanese normal-names character-intro screen — shows 4 ghosts with character-archetype / nickname pairs: OIKAKE (Akabei), MACHIBUSE (Pinky), KIMAGURE (Aosuke), OTOBOKE (Guzuta); plus 10-pt and 50-pt dot legend. Footer: 'namco / CREDIT'
